llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.4 (Approval of Personnel Changes for 2022-2023) was moved from Action Items to Consent Items during the Changes to the Agenda section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move those items? So move second roll call, please. Trustee McAvoy? Aye. Trustee Wallace? Aye. Trustee Lawson? Aye. Vice President Marcus? Aye. President Diaz Locum. Aye.
